purpose: Directly measured or nominal rig values used only as initial guesses and fitting priors. This file contains no fitted calibration results.

verification.note: User verified the carried-over physical parameters and corrected the magnet center to z = 28 mm, 8 mm above the sensor plane.

axes.x: roll axis; sensor 1 side at mechanical home
axes.z: yaw axis; from pivot toward sensor plane

workspace_deg.source: user-selected operating workspace for the clean calibration pipeline, updated 2026-07-17

sensor_plane_z_mm.source: proof-of-concept rig measurement; re-measure before fitting

ring_radius_mm.source: proof-of-concept rig measurement; re-measure before fitting

sensor_1.position_source: derived from recorded radius, plane height, and zero-degree azimuth

sensor_2.position_source: derived from recorded radius, plane height, and -120-degree azimuth

sensors.note: Old fitted chip rotations, gains, biases, and sensor offsets are deliberately excluded. They must be obtained by the new calibration workflow.

diameter_mm.source: magnet specification; verify the installed part

height_mm.source: magnet specification; verify the installed part

home_center_position_mm.source: user-verified rig measurement: 8 mm above the 20 mm sensor plane

axis_direction_at_home.source: observed magnet polarity along +x; re-check after final installation

nominal_polarization_T.source: nominal modeling value, not a direct field measurement

imu.note: Do not copy the old fitted IMU mount rotation. Validate the reader axis convention and startup yaw reference during the IMU step.

required_before_model_fitting: Choose explicit fitting bounds or conservative prior uncertainties for values whose measurement uncertainty is unavailable.
Complete the new magnet-out sensor calibration.
